title: prangos goniocarpa var. stenoptera
intro: Prangos goniocarpa var. stenoptera, also known as the 'Sichuan Prangle', is a plant species belonging to the Apiaceae family, native to the mountainous regions of Asia. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including its antimicrobial, anti-inflammatory, and antioxidant activities. The health benefits of Prangos goniocarpa var. stenoptera include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate pain, and support the immune system. In herbal preparations, the plant's roots are typically dried and processed into teas, infusions, or tinctures for medicinal purposes.
